axisNote: 0-4 priors only (0=hedged/abstract/coded/noun-stacked/run-on/cringe/flat, 4=declared/concrete/plain/verb-led/short/calm-confident/lands). Ratings are the truth; priors just help the sampler pick pairs that differ on one axis. temp: 0=hype-or-cold, 4=calm-confident.

items.subject: mission
items.text: Project management for the 80% who don't work in tech.

items.subject: mission
items.text: We build clarity for everyone.

items.subject: mission
items.text: Software that learned you, not the other way around.

items.subject: mission
items.text: The operating system for modern work.

items.subject: mission
items.text: Boring on purpose. Built slowly.

items.subject: mission
items.text: Modern, simple, beautiful.

items.subject: audience
items.text: You are not a project manager. Stop being asked to act like one.

items.subject: audience
items.text: You shouldn't need a special vocabulary to run your own work.

items.subject: audience
items.text: For the wedding planner running eight jobs off the back of a notebook.

items.subject: audience
items.text: Built for teams that want to move faster.

items.subject: audience
items.text: A wedding to plan. A college year to keep on top of. A crew to keep aligned.

items.subject: audience
items.text: Finally, project management that gets you.

items.subject: tasks
items.text: Execution clarity for live work.

items.subject: tasks
items.text: Board, list, timeline, calendar. Same work, four ways to see it.

items.subject: tasks
items.text: A seamless, unified workspace to supercharge your team's productivity.

items.subject: tasks
items.text: Switch how you see the work without re-entering any of it.

items.subject: tasks
items.text: Tasks runs the work. Everything else assembles around it.

items.subject: timeline
items.text: A public plan your customers can actually read.

items.subject: timeline
items.text: Show your work, not your Jira.

items.subject: timeline
items.text: Increase stakeholder alignment with real-time roadmap visibility.

items.subject: timeline
items.text: One link. Plain English. No login, no app, no translation layer.

items.subject: timeline
items.text: Your customers read it at midnight, on a phone, and understand it.

items.subject: signal
items.text: A briefing, not a dashboard.

items.subject: signal
items.text: One thing, first.

items.subject: signal
items.text: Signal surfaces what matters in your work.

items.subject: signal
items.text: Signal cuts the noise so the important stuff rises.

items.subject: signal
items.text: Signal streamlines your operational visibility.

items.subject: signal
items.text: The one thing that needs you today, and the quiet list of what doesn't.

items.subject: notes
items.text: Write it here first. Before it fades.

items.subject: notes
items.text: Not everything is ready for the room. Write it here first.

items.subject: notes
items.text: Capture your thoughts and boost your personal productivity.

items.subject: notes
items.text: Your private layer.

items.subject: notes
items.text: The half-formed thought goes here. It leaves only when you say so.

items.subject: empty-state
items.text: Nothing needs you right now.

items.subject: empty-state
items.text: You're all caught up. Enjoy the quiet.

items.subject: empty-state
items.text: No items to display.

items.subject: empty-state
items.text: Your board is empty. Add the first thing that needs doing.

items.subject: error
items.text: This may need attention.

items.subject: error
items.text: Task overdue.

items.subject: error
items.text: Something went wrong. We couldn't save that. Try again in a moment.

items.subject: error
items.text: Oops! Looks like we hit a snag.

items.subject: cta
items.text: Open the workspace.

items.subject: cta
items.text: Get started for free today!

items.subject: cta
items.text: See the plan, in plain English.

items.subject: cta
items.text: Start your free trial and unlock your team's full potential.

items.subject: tagline
items.text: Run your work, not a methodology.

items.subject: tagline
items.text: The work, in plain English.

items.subject: tagline
items.text: Grown-up software that treats you like one.

items.subject: tagline
items.text: Small tools. Real work.

items.subject: tagline
items.text: Coordination without the corporate.

items.subject: tagline
items.text: For people who do the work, not manage the manager.

items.subject: hero
items.text: Nothing to learn. Just start.

items.subject: hero
items.text: The tool disappears. The work stays.

items.subject: hero
items.text: Open it. It already makes sense.

items.subject: hero
items.text: You have the work. We have the calm.

items.subject: stolen
items.text: Less, but better.

items.subject: stolen
items.text: The best feature is no feature.
items.note: after Musk 'best part is no part'

items.subject: stolen
items.text: We took things away until only the work was left.

items.subject: stolen
items.text: Finished when there's nothing left to remove.

items.subject: stolen
items.text: You're not a moron. We won't write like you are.

items.subject: competitor
items.text: Notion became a wiki. Asana became enterprise software. We stayed a tool.

items.subject: competitor
items.text: No sprints. No standups. No one asking for your velocity.

items.subject: competitor
items.text: Jira is for engineers. This is for everyone they forgot.

items.subject: competitor
items.text: Their jargon is our opportunity.

items.subject: competitor
items.text: You don't need a certification to use it.

items.subject: wildcard
items.text: Boring software for people with better things to do.

items.subject: wildcard
items.text: If it needs a tutorial, we failed.

items.subject: wildcard
items.text: Software that shuts up.

items.subject: wildcard
items.text: The last tool you'll have to learn.

items.subject: wildcard
items.text: Project management for people who'd never call it that.

items.subject: timeline
items.text: Send a link. They get it.

items.subject: signal
items.text: It reads your work overnight. You read one paragraph.

items.subject: notes
items.text: Catch the thought before it's gone.

items.subject: tasks
items.text: Move the work, not the meeting.

items.subject: cta
items.text: Start with one thing.

items.subject: cta
items.text: Try it in a minute.

items.subject: about
items.text: Built by one person, in Limerick, on purpose.

items.subject: about
items.text: We ship slowly because we ship for years.

items.subject: about
items.text: The moat is what we refuse to build.
